citations.text: AI4K12 Initiative (2020-2022). Five Big Ideas in Artificial Intelligence, Grade Band Progression Charts. A joint project of AAAI and CSTA, funded by NSF award DRL-1846073.

statement.en: Maps can be geometrically accurate or just show which places are reachable from which other places (topology). They can contain many types of information, such as the names and sizes of cities and towns, or the types of roads connecting them.
